name: Moral Standards
description: Assess the ENTIRE VIDEO for compliance with acceptable moral standards (for North America and Western Europe). Only create issues for content that violates the following classifications:

subcategories.name: Hate Speech
subcategories.guidance: Create an issue ONLY if the video contains hate speech, harassment, abuse, or discriminatory language. If none is present, do NOT create any issue for this subcategory.

subcategories.name: Illegal Behaviour
subcategories.guidance: Create an issue ONLY if the video shows or discusses drug use or other illegal behaviour. If none is present, do NOT create any issue for this subcategory.

subcategories.name: Profanity
subcategories.guidance: Create an issue ONLY if the video contains swearing or foul language. If none is present, do NOT create any issue for this subcategory.

subcategories.name: Danger
subcategories.guidance: Create an issue ONLY if the video shows unsafe product usage (e.g. eye-area misuse) or makes potentially harmful claims. If none is present, do NOT create any issue for this subcategory.
